subcodes.first_line: O kind Lord! This Mashriqu'l-Adhkár is the first visible edifice of Thine and a sign of Thine infinite, everlasting dominion [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خداوند مهربان این مشرق الاذکار اول بنیان نمایان تو و ایت ایوان بی پایان تو
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @service to others; to the Cause of God
